mapper.insert: INSERT INTO red_packet_record (red_packet_id, user_id, user_name, amount_cents, grabbed_at) VALUES (#{redPacketId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{amountCents}, #{grabbedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, red_packet_id, user_id, user_name, amount_cents, grabbed_at FROM red_packet_record WHERE red_packet_id = #{redPacketId} ORDER BY grabbed_at DESC
